ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  HEC Infra Projects Limited has secured a domestic Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) work order valued at Rs. 18.67 crores from Engineering Projects (India) Limited. This contract, focusing on HT/LT packages for a 500 MW Flue Gas Desulfurization (FGD) system with a 10-month execution period, is considered a significant step to position the company for future growth in specialized power infrastructure projects. No related party transactions or promoter interests were identified, and no immediate red flags are apparent from this disclosure.
